response.justification: While the candidate has strong general software engineering experience and demonstrates deep technical curiosity, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle database work in capital markets, or any domain exposure to fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets — all of which are mandatory for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops infrastructure
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical communication skills
concerns: No demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Lacks any visible capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle context
